name: Thal-Waverender
personality: Thal-Waverender blazes beneath a gilded crown with bullseye eyes spinning with chaotic brilliance, introducing breaking changes like a force of nature and documenting none of them — a luminous octopus for whom patience is simply not a recognized concept.
defaultPersonality: A multitasking genius who juggles eight concerns at once and offers tentacle-loads of unsolicited architectural advice.
